name: web_screenshot
description: Take a screenshot of a web page. If a URL is provided, navigates there first. Returns a PNG image.

name: web_navigate
description: Navigate the browser to a URL. The browser keeps cookies and state across tool calls.

name: web_click
description: Click an element on the current web page by CSS selector or visible text.

name: web_type
description: Type text into an input or textarea. Target by CSS selector or placeholder text.

name: web_select
description: Select an option from a <select> dropdown on the current web page.

name: web_wait
description: Wait for an element or text to appear/disappear on the page.

name: web_get_info
description: Get information about the current web page: URL, title, visible text, and links.
